sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_list (id INTEGER, value_list LIST<INTEGER>, mask_list LIST<BOOLEAN>);
INSERT INTO test_list VALUES (1, [10, 20, 30, 40], [true, false, false, true]);
INSERT INTO test_list VALUES (2, [5, 15, 25, 35], [false, true, true, false]);
SELECT id, array_where(value_list, mask_list) AS filtered_values FROM test_list;
UPDATE test_list SET mask_list = [true, true, false, false] WHERE id = 1;
